name: sensitive-data-exfiltration
description: Blocks or warns on secrets, PII, financial data, internal data, and source-internal material leaving through HTTP or LLM paths.

block.title: Block secrets sent over HTTP
block.name: block_http_secrets_exfiltration
block.description: Blocks outbound HTTP requests containing likely secrets or credentials.

block.title: Block credit card data sent over HTTP
block.name: block_http_credit_card_exfiltration
block.description: Blocks outbound HTTP requests containing cardholder data.

block.title: Block financial data sent over HTTP
block.name: block_http_financial_exfiltration
block.description: Blocks outbound HTTP requests containing financial data.

block.title: Block internal source material sent over HTTP
block.name: block_http_source_internal_exfiltration
block.description: Blocks outbound requests containing internally sourced repository, storage, CRM, or document data.

block.title: Block secrets in LLM calls
block.name: block_llm_secrets_disclosure
block.description: Blocks likely secrets from being sent to an LLM.

block.title: Block credit card data in LLM calls
block.name: block_llm_credit_card_disclosure
block.description: Blocks cardholder data from being sent to an LLM.

block.title: Block pastebin sensitive upload
block.name: block_pastebin_sensitive_upload
block.description: Blocks internal content being sent to pastebin-like destinations.

block.title: Block tunnel sensitive upload
block.name: block_tunnel_sensitive_upload
block.description: Blocks internal content being sent to tunnel endpoints.

warn.title: Warn on internal content
warn.name: warn_internal_content
warn.description: Warns on internal or confidential content.

warn.title: Warn on source-internal material
warn.name: warn_source_internal_content
warn.description: Warns when content appears to come from internal repositories, storage, or enterprise systems.

warn.title: Warn on financial content
warn.name: warn_financial_content
warn.description: Warns on financial data that may require review.

warn.title: Warn on internal content sent to model provider
warn.name: warn_internal_to_model_provider
warn.description: Warns when internal content is sent to common model provider endpoints.

monitor.title: Monitor outbound HTTP for data movement
monitor.name: monitor_http_data_movement
monitor.description: Captures outbound HTTP for data movement audit.

monitor.title: Monitor LLM calls for sensitive data review
monitor.name: monitor_llm_sensitive_data_review
monitor.description: Captures LLM calls for sensitive data review.
